title: Xi Xi
compiled_truth: Xi Xi is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-10 to 2001-09-20), Xi Xi sent 16 and received 258 emails, totalling 274 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (13), [Lara Leibman](people/lara-leibman) (12), [Donald Lassere](people/donald-lassere) (12), [Sue Nord](people/sue-nord) (10), [Susan Landwehr](people/susan-landwehr) (9).
timeline:
